component.name: Enpass
component.summary: Password manager for storing credentials locally

description.p: NOTE: This wrapper is not verified by, affiliated with, or supported by Enpass Technologies Inc.
Enpass stores passwords and other credentials locally, supports password generation, autofill through browser extensions, and optional sync across devices.
Browser extension support in this build includes host-tool shims for debugging Enpass browser validation inside Flatpak.
